name: Create IAM Roles Anywhere Trust Anchor
description: Simulates an attacker creating an IAM Roles Anywhere trust anchor using a self-signed certificate, enabling external workloads to assume IAM roles using X.509 certificates without long-term AWS credentials.
prerequisites: None — the attack creates and cleans up its own trust anchor
detection_signal: rolesanywhere:CreateTrustAnchor — rare API call almost never made outside initial IAM Roles Anywhere setup; warrants immediate investigation
